title: Uttlesford District Council: Notice of de-designation
body: "Uttlesford District Council is de-designated with effect from 6 June 2025.  Uttlesford District Council was designated for quality of decision-making in respect of applications for planning permission for major development on 8 February 2022. The designation notice can be viewed here: Uttlesford District Council: Notice of Designation - GOV.UK. "
